coffee-pub-artificer.headingH1GettingStarted-Hint: This is the getting started section of the module.
coffee-pub-artificer.headingH4Introduction-Hint: This is the introduction section of the module.
coffee-pub-artificer.headingH2CommonSettings-Hint: This is the common settings section of the module.
coffee-pub-artificer.headingH3JournalSettings-Hint: Configure which journals are used for recipes and blueprints.
coffee-pub-artificer.headingH3CompendiumSettings-Hint: Configure which compendiums to search for ingredients. They are in priority order and we stop looking when we find a match.
coffee-pub-artificer.itemLookupOrder-Hint: When resolving items by name (e.g. recipe results, containers): compendia first, world first, or compendia only.
coffee-pub-artificer.ingredientStorageSource-Hint: Where the Ingredient API loads from: compendia only, world items only, or both (with priority order). Requires reload when changed.
coffee-pub-artificer.headingH3ExampleSubheader-Hint: This is an example subheader for the module.
coffee-pub-artificer.recipeJournalName-Hint: World journal with this exact name is used for recipes. Import creates it if missing.
coffee-pub-artificer.recipeJournalFolder-Hint: Folder where to look for or create the named recipe journal. Leave empty to use any folder.
coffee-pub-artificer.numRecipeCompendiums-Hint: How many Journal compendium slots to show (0-10). Reload to apply.
coffee-pub-artificer.recipeLookupOrder-Hint: When resolving recipes (e.g. dedupe): compendia first, world first, or compendia only.
coffee-pub-artificer.recipeStorageSource-Hint: Where recipes load from: compendia only, world folder only, or both (with priority order). Requires reload when changed.
coffee-pub-artificer.blueprintJournal-Hint: Select the journal containing blueprint entries. Each page is parsed as a blueprint.
coffee-pub-artificer.numIngredientCompendiums-Hint: Number of compendiums to search for ingredients. Adjust the slider to add or remove priority slots.
coffee-pub-artificer.headingH1SkillsAndGathering-Hint: Select the rulesets and themes that drive the crafting experience.
coffee-pub-artificer.skillsRulesetJson-Hint: Choose the Skill JSON that will drive the crafting engine.
coffee-pub-artificer.gatheringRulesetJson-Hint: Choose the Gathering Ruleset that will drive gathering visuals and image resolution (biome/state/family mapping).
coffee-pub-artificer.translationItemJson-Hint: Flat JSON object: normalized alias key → canonical item name for the ingredient cache index. Invalid or missing file is reported to the GM (no silent fallback). Change this setting to reload aliases.
